title: AUGSUN 110 Pieces 1/2 Inch Stainless Steel Track and Cross Country Spikes with Spike Wrench, Replacement Spikes for Sprint Sports Short Running Shoes
features: 【QUALITY MATERIAL】: Made of quality stainless steel, which is very sturdy, rust-resist and anti-corrode. Pyramid needle design, not damage track. Very practical items for both men and women.
【PACKAGE INCLUDES】: Package includes 110 pieces spikes with 1pcs spike wrench, convenient for you to replace your shoe spikes. There are enough quantity for your daily use.
【SIZE】: 1.27cm (1/2 inch) in length, tapered and needle-shaped, which increases friction between the sole and the ground and prevents skidding.

【EASY TO USE & REPLACE SPIKES】: The package includes a spike wrench. It is very easy for you to screw the track spikes into the shoes, convenient to replace the spikes. Ideal for athletic tracks, field and cross country surfaces.

【PROVIDE GREAT DRIP FOR SPORTSMAN】: The spike pins can increase the friction between the shoe sole and ground, resist skid and improve your running balance of traction, flexibility and speed for track sprints, long jump, running.

title: ASICS Mens Gel-Venture 6 Running Shoe
description:
The GEL-Venture 5 provides great fit and everyday comfort, with Rearfoot GEL Cushioning and a rugged outsole ideal for a variety of terrains.
In 1949, Mr. Kihachiro Onitsuka began his athletic footwear company (Onitsuka Co., Ltd.) by manufacturing basketball shoes out of his living room in Kobe, Japan. He chose the name ASICS for his company in 1977, based on a famous Latin phrase "Anima Sana In Corpore Sano," which, when translated, expresses the ancient ideal of "A Sound Mind in a Sound Body." Taking the acronym of this phrase, ASICS was founded on the belief that the best way to create a healthy and happy lifestyle is to promote total health and fitness. Today, ASICS offers a full line of performance-driven athletic shoes and technical active sports apparel and accessories dedicated to bringing harmony to the body and soul.
features: Rubber sole
Outdoor-ready runner with mesh and brushstroke-patterned underlays
Rearfoot GEL cushioning
Removable sockliner accommodates medical orthotics
Trail-specific outsole with reversed traction lugs
AHAR outsole rubber in critical high-wear areas

reviews.title: COMFORT
reviews.text: I LOVE THIS SHOE DUE TO THE FACT I HAD HARDWARE INSTALLED INTO MY RIGHT FOOT BECAUSE MY TOES HAVE COLLAPSED FROM RHEUMATOID ARTHRITIS .... THE ORTHOPEADIC DOCTOR RECOMMEND THIS BRAND ( RUNNING SHOE) SINCE I WORK ON CONCRETE FLOORS ..... THIS SHOE HELPS A GREAT DEAL FOR ME AND I HOPE IT HELPS SOMEONE ELSE GOING THROUGH THE SAME THING .... ALL THESE DIFFERENT KINDS OF GYM SHOES I BOUGHT AND NOTHING WORKS TIL THE DOCTOR RECOMMEND THIS BRAND OF SHOE. I'M NOT GETTING PAID TO SAY THIS, BUT I WILL SAY, IF YOU WERE IN MY POSITION TRYING TO FIND COMFORT AFTER SPENDING $$$$ FOR SEVERAL DIFFERENT TYPES OF GYM SHOES AND SOMEONE RECOMMEND A CERTAIN BRAND COMPARED TO ALL THE $$$$ YOU SPENT PRIOR .... I WISH I COULD GET MY MONEY BACK ON EVERY F*****  SINGLE (18) PAIR OF SHOES I PURCHASED ... FROM NOW ON THIS IS MY ONLY GYM SHOE I'LL WEAR FOR NOW ON.... LOVE THE COMFORT, WIDTH, AND I'M ABLE TO WALK MORE THAN 1 MILE WITHOUT HAVING TO STOP BECAUSE MY FEET ARE HURTING DUE TO THE CHRONIC  (RA) CONDITION LIFE THROWN AT ME.  LOVE LOVE LOVE THESE SHOES

reviews.title: Had to get used to them
reviews.text: I love this brand of Nike. I have been wearing this Nike Zoom Vomero for years. It has changed over the years. This shoe at first seemed to tight. I had to loosen the laces. After warring them for about a month they fit fine. One thing that bothers me is they squeak when I walk.

reviews.title: Perfect in every way!
reviews.text: I went to the nike store to measure the curve of my foot and width prior to purchasing these shoes. I am relatively flatfooted and needed good arch support. These were the most fitting option and they were right! I absolutely love these shoes! Nike didn't have these in store at the time so I purchased online. Absolutely adore these shoes. Perfect color - goes along the black I usually wear on a daily basis to school. I generally wear them all day before and after gym. Love love love them!

reviews.title: Don't quite fit... 3 is too small & 13 is too big.
reviews.text:
I ordered Size 3 for my daughter who just grew out of 2s. They are tight, heavy and smaller than another 3 we have.

I ordered size 13 for my son who just outgrew size 12. They are very large and larger than other 13s we have.

Both kids said they are too heavy and stiff. They seem like good quality shoes but I can understand the kids' opinion. We are returning both and will try the running shoes with the mesh instead.

reviews.title: Takes A Beating

reviews.title: Affordable and comfortable
reviews.text:
Update: I decided to keep these. Ok, so I am ashamed to wear them with jeans and a tee, I tried them for everyday but couldn't get over what I'll call the "dad sneakers" look. But I took these for a run and wow! They're very comfortable. A little clunky but flexible enough for daily training and the cushion is just right for me, sightly on the plush side but not squishy. These are my new daily runners. I don't know how long they'll last, but for the price, if I get 200 miles, I'll be happy.

Also, if you're a 3e/4e and you like or need a wide toe box, these will deliver. I'm a smaller 4e but i need a wide toe box, especially since I'm not willing to give up my injinji toe socks. These are very spacious with plenty of room for my toe splay.

-----

Original review: From the product pictures I wasn't sure if I'd like them or hate them. But for the price I figured I might as well try them. They fit nicely, have moderate cushion, and they're more flexible than I expected. They're basic sneakers, no bells or whistles. But they're comfortable enough I would try running in them. They're certainly not fashion forward, but I wouldn't be ashamed to wear them with jeans and a tee. And if you're looking for extra-wide these fit like a true 4e. I expected to hate them but I'm pleasantly surprised and I'll probably keep them and use they for everyday sneakers or runners.

reviews.title: Comfort, arch support and great looking!
reviews.text: My internist and her medical staff wore this fantastic sneaker at my first appointment. They were so good looking, stylish and interesting that I went searching for them when I got home!  They come lots of trendy colors and fit true to size. I bought one pair and enjoyed walking in them so much that I ordered a second pair in red! A small stylish loop on the heel allows you to easily put them on and take them off.  These sneakers are sooo comfy and have good arch support! Doc approved!

reviews.title: Made in China.  As written on the shoes. . . They are "mediocre" but decent overall.
reviews.text:
These are “mediocre” shoes. You know that because written on them is “Just So So”. Why a company would advertise that their shoes are “Just So So”. . . But. . . These shoes are Made in China and being sold by a Chinese company on Amazon. . . So. . . Perhaps it’s a phrase that’s “lost in translation”.

Though you can’t see it perfectly in the pictures. . . The soles of these shoes are see-through. The sole is hard plastic with a non-stop bottom. The uppers are mesh, so they are “airy”. The footbed has nice arch support, which is a bit unusual for Chinese shoes. Nice padding on the footbed, as well as around the ankle.

reviews.title: Great for trail hiking

These are great! This is the second pair of owned, just a different color style this time.
I did notice one is a bit more snug than the other, but that could just be my foot. Also I know they'll stretch out over time. The comfort and support are great, the treads are just right for our rocky environment in southeast Oregon.
I'm usually a 9.5 W in some brands. I bought these in a 10 regular, not wide width. The length and width are just right for me.

These also have great support for cardio workouts and walking/hiking long distances, especially on rough terrain.

ON THE GO: Great for traveling, hiking, camping or organizing at home. Hang extra shoes or equipment in your garage, lockers, tents or shoe racks!

I weith right at 300 lbs and they support me just fine.. now know I also own Brooks, NB, Adidas, UA HOVR, etc... shoes as well.. are these as comfortable as they are.. No.. but they sure pack a punch bang for the buck thought.. NOW.. One huge issue.;. and again I wanted to wait and see if the soles "scuffed up: for traction.. but no.. If there is rain.. and the water on any surface is thin.. like tile, ocncrete, wood or anything besices most asphalt.. this shoe is like your walking on thin ice.. and YOU WILL SKID! Be warned.. Good.. but Dry use ONLY

title: Mizuno Women's Wave Horizon 2 Running Shoe
description:
Introducing the softest, most stable ride ever to come out of Mizuno running. Our new stability technology called smooth ride support is combined with cloud Wave to create a soft, lively and cushioned feel with adequate support and smooth guidance.
Since our founding in 1906, we at Mizuno have taken special pride and pleasure in being able to participate in the exciting world of sports and in making the entire globe the stage for our activities. Each and every one of us is guided by the ideal of true sportsmanship. That was true nearly 100 years ago and is still true today. It is evident in our corporate philosophy which, simply stated, is "Contributing to society through the advancement of sporting goods and the promotion of sports." This philosophy is clearly reflected in our strong support of numerous worldwide sport events and in our dedication to advancing sports through cutting edge technology and research. Our product development strategy is to create products with features that enhance athlete performance and are unique to only Mizuno. These technological advancements make our sporting equipment and apparel go the extra mile and keep you in tip top playing form no matter the sport nor the conditions. Whether it's our Breath Thermo line of clothing which generates heat from the absorption of moisture to keep you warm in cooler temperatures, to our line of Arctic Touch garments that expels heat and moisture generated by the body during exercise to keep your body cool and comfortable, your comfort and performance are at the forefront of our innovation. From the diamond to the track, from the court to the fairway, Mizuno's commitment to Serious Performance shines through. Today, the high quality equipment that only Mizuno can produce are relied upon by athletes throughout the world. We produce superior quality equipment for serious performance, through the artful combination of technology and craftsmanship. Because, at Mizuno, your passion is our obsession.

New Balance, is dedicated to helping athletes achieve their goals. It's been their mission for more than a century. It's why they don't spend money on celebrity endorsements. They spend it on research and development. It's why they don't design products to fit an image. They design them to fit. New Balance is driven to make the finest shoes for the same reason athletes lace them up: to achieve the very best.

reviews.title: a lite duty general purpose shoe
reviews.text:
I hd to send back my normal size, a 9EEE, for a size larger. I've had this variation in size before with New Balance so beware. I'm still giving it 5 stars for style and price.

You may have noticed that price varies considerably with the color sub/style you choose. Mine were only $21 while others are substantially more. I assume construction is the same on all of them? Maybe the price is based on the current inventory? My price dropped slightly after I ordered.

While it is sold as a running shoe (?) and is probably adequate for this purpose a serious high mileage runner would probably pay more to get more. If you can get the right price point as I did they are certainly worth a try as a general purpose/athletic/walking shoe.

title: New Balance Men's 410 V6 Trail Running Shoe
description:
Be off-road ready in the New Balance 410v6 men’s trail shoe. Featuring a durable AT Tread rubber outsole, this shoe is fit for any adventure. Made with a sleek upper, ACTEVA midsole technology and a cushioned NB Comfort Insert, the versatile men’s running shoe is designed to keep you comfortable and stylish before, during and after your hike.
New Balance, is dedicated to helping athletes achieve their goals. It's been their mission for more than a century. It's why they don't spend money on celebrity endorsements. They spend it on research and development. It's why they don't design products to fit an image. They design them to fit. New Balance is driven to make the finest shoes for the same reason athletes lace them up: to achieve the very best.
features: 50% Synthetic, 50% Mesh
Imported
Rubber sole
ACTEVA midsole cushioning delivers versatile, flexible support
AT Tread outsole provides versatile traction during both on and off-road activities
Lightweight injection-molded EVA foam midsole provides lightweight cushioning
NB Comfort Insert offers additional cushioning
Synthetic/mesh upper

reviews.title: Sizing
reviews.text: Too narrow

reviews.title: Cheap quality
reviews.text: These are wimpy tennis shoes.  They probably wont' make it a year.  I judge the quality by picking up the shoe and twisting in my hands.  I can easily warp these shoes.  I have some Merrills and I absolutely can't bend them up.

reviews.title: Not the best looking shoe but the most comfortable!
reviews.text: Man my feet hurt. And because I wear the same shoes everyday all day they break down pretty quickly.  These are perfect.  The color isn't my absolute favorite BUT that was the color that was on sale. Besides I'm nearly 50 so I'm not out to impress anyone lol.  They fit my feet perfectly and  there is no better feeling of new shoes when your old shoes broke down! Just enough support.

reviews.title: Great Walking Shoe!
reviews.text: I got these for at home. I like wearing shoes inside. So they need to be clean. I got these, and they are comfy and see like they will last a long time. They should, if I only wear them in my house.

reviews.title: Good fit in a large size
reviews.text: I bought these shoes as a gift for my 25 year old son, who wears a size 16. I know from past experience that New Balance provides a good, consistent fit in their large sizes, and this pair did not disappoint. The fit was great and my son liked the color and style.

title: Brooks Men’s Launch 9 Neutral Running Shoe
features: Imported

THIS MEN’S SHOE IS FOR: The Launch 9 is for neutral runners who want a dependable, lightweight shoe with DNA cushioning and a highly breathable upper that helps runners go fast on every run. We recommend ordering Brooks running shoes 1/2 to one size larger than your dress shoe.
NEUTRAL SUPPORT: Lightweight, streamlined, with even more BioMoGo DNA cushioning, the Launch 9 offers neutral support to keep you running faster mile after mile.
ENHANCED BREATHABILITY: Reengineered upper features Creel Warp mesh, designed to be extremely light and breathable. Hints of reflectivity on the upper to increase visibility on the road.

LIGHTWEIGHT CUSHIONING: We have added more BioMoGo DNA cushioning to the midsole for an even faster ride without the extra weight. A dynamically responsive ride for days when you are working on your speed.
RESPONSIVE TRANSITIONS: Redesigned midsole increased by 2 mm to provide runners with more responsiveness while the Green Rubber Outsole helps your foot move quickly from heel to toe.

reviews.title: My new favorite running shoe.
reviews.text: Perfect fit right out of the box.  Wonderful cushioned run and very light weight.  Well made and no signs of wear even after several long runs.  Wide enough toe box to prevent any rubbing.  True to size.

reviews.title: BROOKS ARE The BEST SHOES HANDS DOWN
reviews.text: Nothing to dislike light durable great for weightlifting

reviews.title: Get what you pay for
reviews.text:
I sent these back after trying on. They look longer than they are when on your feet, I assume it’s due to the design. Didn’t have the best feel and overall a great name but bad shoe.
I’d go with a better brooks or On Clouds

reviews.title: Very light and comfortable
reviews.text: Nice and light and comfortable which was what I wanted. I love how well they fit. Good price, too, for the quality.

title: New Balance Women's Cruz V2 Fresh Foam Running Shoe
description:
Fresh gets even fresher with the introduction of the fresh foam cruz V2 knit. Featuring a softer, lighter version of our award-winning fresh foam technology, it's comfort youve never felt before. A heathered knit upper is as stylish as it is technical and a suede saddle and deconstructed heel support you no matter where you take the shoe. Its performance with everyday style.

title: Brooks Women's Ghost 14 Neutral Running Shoe
features: Imported
Rubber sole

THIS WOMEN'S SHOE IS FOR: Runners looking for a smooth ride that won’t distract from the fun of the run. The Ghost 14 offers a simplified midsole construction which creates more seamless transitions. This Brooks Ghost 14 is a certified PDAC A5500 Diabetic shoe and has been granted the APMA Seal of Acceptance.

SUPPORT AND CUSHION: The Ghost 14 offers neutral support while providing high energizing cushioning. Ideal for road running, cross training, the gym or wherever you might want to take them! Predecessor: Ghost 13

BALANCED, SOFT CUSHIONING: BioMoGo DNA and DNA LOFT cushioning work together to provide a just-right softness underfoot without losing responsiveness and durability - yet it feels lighter than ever. DNA LOFT now makes up the entire midsole, for a softer, smoother, ride.
SMOOTH, STABLE RIDE: No matter how your foot lands, our Segmented Crash Pad - an integrated system of shock absorbers - will cushion every step and stride for smooth heel-to-toe transitions.
SOFT, SECURE, FIT: More strategic use of the 3D Fit Print upper technology provides structure that moves with the foot.

reviews.title: Beware of imposters
reviews.text:
My original Brooks ripped in the seam so I ordered a new pair in Amazon. When they came they did not fit like my old ones at all.
I ended up contacting BrooksRunning directly and received the pair from them. TOTALLY PERFECT!!
What a difference from the ones purchased in Amazon. Even the labeling is different. Brooks is one of the most comfortable sneakers I have ever owned. I have four pairs. I did not have any luck through Amazon.

reviews.title: So comfortable!
reviews.text: Comfortable, good support, walked over 9 miles without blisters.  The laces were too short, but over all I highly recommend.

reviews.title: The perfect shoe for me.
reviews.text:
This is the third iteration of Brooks' Ghost running shoe that I've purchased. I have 8, 9, and now 14. These are the most comfortable shoes I own. They're supportive, have enough room in the toe box, and cushioning in the soles.
I'm glad they come in solid colors as well as multicolored. I plan to buy another pair of Ghost 14 in the solid grey option.

reviews.title: Comfy must-buy
reviews.text: These are comfortable right out of the box. They have good supportive insoles and are very cushioned while being surprisingly lightweight. I bought them for a trip to Disneyland so they will get quite a product test in and I'll update when I know more.

reviews.title: Comfort and quality
reviews.text: Brooks makes the best running shoe! So comfortable and attractive. They last forever, too!
